name: Sesame Crusted Ahi Tuna and Wasabi Beurre Blanc
recipeIngredient: 1 Piece sushi grade tuna loin (about 1 pound, cleaned)
1 Stick butter (cut into small pieces, at room temperature)
1 Tablespoon wasabi paste, diluted with 1/2 tablespoon rice vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Season tuna with salt and pepper on each side.
2. Combine black and white sesame seeds in a shallow dish.
3. Roll the tuna in the sesame seed mixture, coating it evenly.
4. Set aside the tuna.
5. In a saucepan, simmer shallots, thyme, pepper, bay leaf, and white wine over low heat until the liquid has reduced slightly.
6. Add heavy cream to the saucepan and bring to a gentle boil.
7. Slowly whisk in butter one piece at a time until the sauce is smooth and velvety.
8. Season with salt and pepper, then strain the sauce to remove any impurities.
9. Keep the beurre blanc warm over low heat.
10. In a large skillet, lightly brush the tuna with olive oil and sear for 2 minutes on each side.
11. Slice the tuna into 12 medallions.
12. Serve immediately on serving plates.
13. Drizzle with the beurre blanc infused with wasabi paste and rice vinegar.
Yield: 4 servings
